I don't know if I can survive in this digital circus alone

The “Jax X Pomni Song MUSIC VIDEO 🎶 (The Amazing Digital Circus)” Is a song created by BENJIxScarlett and is heavily based on an animated indie show called “The Amazing Digital Circus” and features the ship “Jax x Pomni” with jax talking about how special and cute pomni is. This song has also been heavily memed for how bad the lyrics and song are, and also because the song is generally hilarious. It’s currently unknown if the song is for a content farm or if it’s a dumb joke.

Clocking in at 11:23, it is easily Yankovic’s longest song, as it tells a fictionalized version of his life and his various adventures in the town of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Despite Yankovic’s intention for the song to “annoy people for 12 minutes”, the song has become a fan favorite. Still, Al has very rarely played it live, usually as an encore, given that it forces him to yell for over 10 minutes.

Al mentions that he’s removing earwax with a golf pencil as if this is a regular occurrence. Golf pencils are thick pencils with no eraser, and would not be well-suited to cleaning out earwax.
